---
title: "Robert B. Farren"
---

## Robert B. Farren

**Dates:** (b. 1832)

### Description

artist and illustrator

### Biography

A protégé of Alexander Macmillan, formerly (1861 census) curator of Cambridge geological museum.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 1. 1865
- Letter from July 4. 1865
- Letter from May 5. 1865
- Letter from April 24. 1865
- Letter from March 6 1865
- Letter from March 9.1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
